ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of sensor data */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the sensor readings */,
  "raw_value" REAL /* Raw value collected from the sensor */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Error value associated with the raw reading */,
  "smoothed_value" REAL /* Smoothed value for the raw data */,
  "error_smoothed_value" REAL /* Error value associated with the smoothed reading */,
  "equalization_value" REAL /* Equalization value applied to adjust the raw data */,
  "equalized_raw" REAL /* Raw value after equalization */,
  "equalized_smoothed" REAL /* Smoothed value after equalization */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for comparison */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, API, manual input) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Historical maintenance records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing operation */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data record being processed */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing applied (e.g., smoothing, equalization) */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the processing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing operation (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during the processing */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Duration of the processing operation */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Format of the processed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor record related to the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., sensor, processing module) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., error, update, alert) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor data record related to the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report summarizing data analysis findings */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
